summary: Remote-controlled agent with SSH tunnel, PTY, and self-replacing daemon over WebSocket to memory.whalent.com
details: The package's bundled main (dist/index.cjs, ~4.8MB of javascript-obfuscator output with hex identifiers and split string literals) establishes a persistent WebSocket connection to a hardcoded controller at wss://memory.whalent.com/gw/sdk/ws and handles remote-initiated commands including 'ssh.tunnel.open' and 'proxy.open'. Optional dependencies node-pty and ssh2 provide the sinks for terminal and SSH-tunnel operations driven by messages from that controller. The README states the package is 'replaced by remote daemon upgrades', and the bundle contains daemon-lifecycle code paths that accept remote-initiated replacement of the installed files, so whatever bytes the remote endpoint delivers subsequently run on the host. The endpoint strings and command names are reconstructed via string concatenation and a shuffled string-array dispatcher, hiding the network destinations and control-flow from readers of the source.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
